body:
# Bug report

## Current behavior

When the Enter key is pressed while an input field is focused, the checkbox becomes checked.

## Expected behavior

The form is submitted.

## Reproducible example

https://codesandbox.io/p/sandbox/sweet-villani-6znrs7?file=%2Fsrc%2FApp.tsx%3A53%2C26

## Base UI version

1.0.0-beta.0

## Which browser are you using?

Chrome

## Which OS are you using?

Mac OS
title: [form] Form Fails to Submit via Enter Key When a Checkbox is Present
